attributes.action: Re evaluate the legislations on spraying pesticides in our towns and villages.
attributes.additional_details:
The Scottish highland streets have been neglected by our local councils since weed killing was removed a number of years ago 
it’s now time to re introduce weed spraying as our towns and villages are becoming unsitely with weeds.
attributes.background:
The Scottish highland streets are being neglected by our local councils with lack of street cleansing causing unsitely weed growth if the councils are not addressing this issue 
the only solution is to re introduce weed spraying to control the country wide problem.

rejection.details: Maintenance of local streets is a matter for local authorities, not the UK Government or Parliament.
